headline: Cybersecurity Funding Surge Signals ISV Partner Opportunity Across Cloud Platforms
summary: Cybersecurity startups are attracting significant venture funding amid sustained enterprise demand for next-generation threat protection, with Duolingo and TMT sector players also drawing investor attention. Capital concentration in security tooling reflects enterprise buyers prioritizing resilience over cost optimization. This funding cycle will produce a new cohort of ISVs seeking cloud-native deployment partnerships within 12-18 months.
oci_implication: OCI should accelerate security ISV co-sell motions now—freshly funded security vendors are making cloud platform decisions early, and positioning OCI's isolated network architecture and sovereign cloud credentials as differentiators can lock in strategic partnerships before AWS and Azure saturate this cohort.
